title: RLVR Datasets and Where to Find Them: Tracing Data Lineage for Better Training Data
note: ATLAS framework — primary source. 1.45M RLVR instances → 20 atomic sources at 99.7% attribution; source concentration (top-5 = 70.4%); 36,148 contamination instances. Sections §2.1, Table 7, §2.2.

title: Bridging the Data Provenance Gap Across Text, Speech and Video
note: Licensing paradox: <33% of datasets labeled restrictive, >80% of source content carries non-commercial constraints. ~4,000 datasets (3,916), 608 languages, 798 sources, 67 countries audited.

title: Tracing the Roots: A Multi-Agent Framework for Uncovering Data Lineage in Post-Training LLMs
note: 83 seed datasets → 430 datasets, 971 inheritance edges. 19 of 83 seeds contain benchmark leakage; open-instruct-v1 deduplication rate 46.48%.

title: DAPO: An Open-Source LLM Reinforcement Learning System at Scale
note: Open-source RLVR training system; source-aware data curation methodology.

title: DeepMath-103K: A Large-Scale, Challenging, Decontaminated, and Verifiable Mathematical Dataset
note: Dataset production cost: $138,000 / 127,000 GPU-hours. Benchmark for high-quality decontaminated RLVR data.

title: Tülu 3: Pushing Frontiers in Open Language Model Post-Training
note: RLVR-MATH training pipeline; open post-training recipe including verifiable reward stages.

title: How Far Can Reasoning Models Scale?
note: RL compute growth: ~10× every 3–5 months vs pretraining 4–5×/year. DeepSeek-R1-Zero AIME 2024: 10%→71% in 8,000 RL steps at ~1/5 pretraining compute.

title: The State of RL Environments
note: Survey of RLVR training environments; compute and infrastructure scale trends.

title: Anthropic's $1B+ Budget for RL Environment Build-out (reported)
note: Report on Anthropic's exploration of $1B+ investment in RL environment infrastructure. Cited via Epoch AI re-citation.

title: Artificial Intelligence Act — Article 10: Data and Data Governance
note: Documentation obligations for training, validation, and test data. Full application August 2026. Regulatory scope over RL reward data/verifiers remains interpretively unsettled.

title: Data Provenance Initiative — Publications & Multimodal Provenance Audit
note: Broader provenance audit initiative covering text, speech, and video datasets. Organizational home for Longpre et al. 2025.

title: NuminaMath-1.5
note: Key atomic source in ATLAS analysis — dominant upstream dataset in RLVR math training pipelines.

title: AI-Ready 데이터란 무엇인가 — 품질·계보·거버넌스 / What Is AI-Ready Data — Quality, Lineage, Governance
note: Pebblous AI-Ready Data framework — provenance and lineage as a first-class data asset.
